content:
# Cryo Tem

**Summary**: A technique using cryogenically frozen samples to image the internal structure of micelles.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015]] used Cryo-TEM to visualize micelle morphology and confirm transitions between long and short cylindrical structures.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Cryo-TEM revealed the presence of microemulsions in the surfactant solution with 3 wt % n-decane at 60°C. ([[2015-fogang|FOGANG, 2015, p. 71]])
